## Summary

Describe the problem, the proposed change, and why it belongs in the reusable public project.

## Compatibility and resource impact

- Public API impact:
- Wire-format impact:
- Flash/RAM impact:
- Transport or timing impact:

Use `None` with a brief explanation when a category is unaffected.

## Validation

- [ ] Host builds and tests pass
- [ ] Relevant sanitizer and static-analysis checks pass
- [ ] Arduino/Pico/PlatformIO compile checks pass when affected
- [ ] New behavior has deterministic regression coverage
- [ ] Documentation and changelog entries were updated when needed
- [ ] Version metadata remains consistent when release data changed

## Hardware evidence

- [ ] This change does not affect physical behavior
- [ ] Physical behavior was tested with exact boards, wiring, voltages, bus speed, and toolchain versions
- [ ] Compile-only evidence is not described as hardware validation

Include concise sanitized logs or link a versioned validation report when physical behavior is affected.

## Public project boundary

- [ ] No credentials, private data, generated build outputs, private research results, or board-production files are included
- [ ] Reusable concepts are expressed without private names or fixed private topology assumptions
- [ ] Third-party code and assets have compatible licenses and attribution
